creator: guido.philippi@freenet.de
text:
I have a Problem at instalation from CD-Rom an i hope, you can help me.
I try to install the FreeBSD on my Machine, but i become an Error Message with Code 12, Systemadministrator, Page not presend. The Machine stops an reboot .I don´t know, what that can  be. Please can you help me with that Problem ???
Thank You verry mutch at this time.

WfG

Guido Philippi
